narrative:
Precinct Chillicothe 5-C (precinct in Ross County) has 632 registered voters, with 51.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.2%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.7 percentage points.
